name: open-your-box
description: Open Your Box privacy self-check service

scripts.typecheck: node --check assets/app.js && node --check scripts/build-site.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node --check scripts/identity-smoke-test.mjs && node --check src/server/identity/security.js && node --check src/server/identity/repository.js && node --check src/server/identity/providers.js && node --check src/server/identity/gating.js && node --check src/server/identity/api.js && node --check src/server/scan/async.js
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
